$comment: Camp building lines (design §9) — the repeatable Coin sink. Named §9 upgrades are milestone levels of their line (milestoneUpgradeIds); every further level is bought at baseCostCoin · costGrowth.building^L forever, where L is the line's current total level (bought + owned milestones). perLevel is what each BOUGHT level grants; milestone levels grant their upgrade's own effects. The roosts line's caps use economy.json familiarCaps (§8 formulas). Lines named fire/forge/bench gate the matching recipe station: a recipe needs its station line at level ≥ its stationLevel (iron heat = forge 2). Debut costs are the §9 table's; all first-pass.
